content.body: fwiw in the medium term humanless publishes won't be possible, so the biblio will need some kind of solution: https://github.blog/changelog/2026-07-08-npm-install-time-security-and-gat-bypass2fa-deprecation/ (OIDC will be the last way to do non-2FA publish, but it'll be killed as well eventually) we'll be able to stage things from CI but a human will still need to approve them
